race.comment: The first leg of the quaddie is over 1110m, and finding the winner is not easy. GIVE GIGGLES (10) won fresh up at Eagle Farm by a short-head 3 weeks ago over 1000m, and she gets through wet ground with no problem. She is that little bit stronger this prep, and she is just as sharp second up. She drops 5.5kg, and has another chance to add some black type to her pedigree. NEPO BABY (11) has been G3 placed is her last couple of starts, and she is knocking on the door for her next win. A good draw, and a drop in weight, will make her very competitive again. THE BLACK CLOUD (2) likes it wet, and she will find this easier than her last 2 starts, including her last run in the G1 Galaxy at Rosehill 8 weeks ago. She has the pole position, and a recent sound trial will ensure that she is ready to rumble in this. AUSTMARR (3) fought on gamely fresh up in the Gold Rush at Hawkesbury 2 weeks ago, and she has the services of Zac Purton from a good draw here. CIGAR FLICK (8) include in multiples.
